description_long: This is a tan leather slip-on dress shoe with a sleek, streamlined silhouette and a slightly squared toe. The upper is made from smooth, polished leather with minimal stitching, giving it a refined and formal appearance. The shoe features elastic side gores for easy wearing and removal, and the collar is gently padded for comfort. The heel is low and made of stacked material, complementing the overall formal design. The interior appears to be lined with a lighter, soft material for added comfort. The sole is flat and appears to be made of a durable, slightly textured material suitable for urban environments.
description: A tan leather slip-on dress shoe with a sleek, polished finish and a low stacked heel. It features elastic side gores and minimal stitching for a refined, formal look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the squared toe and smooth, uninterrupted leather upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slip-on design, elastic gore, and low stacked heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded heel and padded collar.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the clean lines and polished leather.
